headline: Willis partners with Circle Asia to launch Asia’s first insurance facility for collectors and galleries
summary: HONG KONG, March 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Willis, a WTW business (NASDAQ: WTW), today announced it has partnered with Circle Asia to launch a new art insurance facility designed specifically for individual collectors and art galleries in Asia. The facility is the first of its kind in Asia, combining specialist arts insurance expertise from Willis and Circle’s digital platform to deliver a seamless and cost-effective way to insure fine art, jewellery and specie collections. Fine art insurance
